honse MUGA FORFRODO Sons of Gondor! Of Rohan! My brothers. I see in your eyes the same fear that would take the heart of me. A day may come when the courage of Men fails, when we forsake our friends and break all bonds of fellowship, but it is not this day. An hour of wolves and shattered shields when the Age of Men comes crashing down, but it is not this day! This day we fight! By all that you hold dear on this good earth, I bid you stand, Men of the West! FORFRODO MUGA

My name is Ádám Torzsás, and I am a world-renowned Hungarian writer. To write my next book, I needed to find the quietest place in the world where I could fully concentrate on my new work. I tried several places and even locked myself in a room alone with no sucess, but today I found the perfect place: the Farmasi Arena in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil. I have never felt so productive and focused in my entire life. I am sure that this will be the best book I have ever written.
